title.en: Soon, one treasure by one was taken out and cla...

content.en:
As the transcendent realm of the fourth realm, the dragon wolf realm lord has a wealth of wealth, and many precious things of the red wolf family are placed on him, after all, it is safer to put it on him than in the treasure house.

But now, with the fall of the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, these treasures all belong to Ye Tian.

Soon, one treasure by one was taken out and classified by Ye Tian.

However, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord's wealth was not as rich as he imagined.

"It seems that a lot of the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord's wealth has still been consumed by him, and it is used to improve his cultivation and other aspects-!"

But Ye Tian still found an incomparably precious thing - a multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation, and it is also a healing multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation, and its value is also very high.

In addition, there is also the original of the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance, which also fell into his hands.

After scraping away all the net worth of the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, Ye Tian used the Multi-Maintenance Refining Treasure Bottle to swallow the body of the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, and began to give birth to the Four Realms Multi-Maintenance Refining Essence.

Once a drop of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence was condensed, Ye Tian's cultivation could easily reach the peak realm of the Third Realm.

Time passed slowly, and it was not so easy to condense the essence of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation, and it would probably take a long time to condense it.

Time has passed since one extradimensional epoch after another.

Time flies, and thirty extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, the first drop of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence was successfully condensed.

"Condensing the multi-dimensional essence of the Four Realms is so slow, it seems that the limit of the multi-dimensional essence condensed by this multi-dimensional treasure bottle is the Four Realms!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If it had an effect on the Fifth Realm, the Fifth Realm would definitely come to scrape or snatch the Duowei Treasure Bottle, but in fact it did not do so.

Even for the extra-dimensional realm at the peak of the fourth realm, the value of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle was limited to the power itself, and it was of little help to individuals.

Of course.

For Ye Tian, the help of the Four Realms to refine the essence was still very great.

He took out this drop of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation Refining Essence, and then swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!!

A majestic energy surged, impacting all parts of Ye Tian's body, and was quickly absorbed by his strong body.

If the ordinary Third Realm dared to refine the Four Realms and refine the essence, it was very likely that they would not be able to bear it and would be injured, but Ye Tian's physical body was too terrifying, much more terrifying than the ordinary Fourth Realm, so he was naturally not afraid of the energy of the Four Realms and the refining essence, and he could easily refine and absorb it.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's cultivation increased rapidly, and he gradually reached the limit of the late stage of the Third Realm.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian hit the bottleneck again and again, and gradually the bottleneck was broken.

Finally, his cultivation ushered in a transformation and reached the peak realm of the third realm.

At this point, his cultivation had reached the limit of the third realm, and there was no room for improvement.

If you want to continue to improve your cultivation, you can only impact the fourth realm.

Of course.

If Ye Tian is attacking the fourth realm now, the success rate is also very high, but he is not in a hurry to impact the fourth realm, he has to raise the extradimensional rules to the realm of one hundred realms before he can impact the fourth realm.

And his current extradimensional rule realm is very close to the hundred realms, and in the two hundred extradimensional epochs that created the black light thorn, he is also contemplating the extradimensional rules.

Now, his extra-dimensional rules have reached the realm of the ninety-six realms, but after reaching this realm, the effect of the nine utu is very weak, and it will take some short years to comprehend the last four extradimensional rules.

I have to say that it is really too difficult for a normal third realm to comprehend a hundred extradimensional rules, that is, he has many great opportunities, so he can do it.

In other third realms, it is impossible to do it, it is very good for them to be able to comprehend the extradimensional rules to twenty or thirty realms in the third realm, so as to gamble on the very low probability of breakthrough, if they are lucky, they will break through to the fourth realm, if they fail two or three times, then there is no hope for the third realm.

The fifth thousand realm, the third realm that has failed many times I don't know how many, and they have no hope of becoming the fourth realm in the future, which also causes the fourth realm of the fifth thousand realm to be too rare.

In the blink of an eye, more than forty extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's extra-dimensional rule realm had finally reached the level of one hundred realms.

After reaching the realm of one hundred extra-dimensional rules, Ye Tian understood the difference between one hundred and ninety-nine realms, why after reaching the realm of one hundred extra-dimensional rules, there would be a 100% chance of breaking through to the fourth realm.

Because after comprehending a hundred extra-dimensional rule realms, one can condense a hundred extra-dimensional rule realms into a super-dimensional rule realm, and within the super-dimensional rule realm, it is almost invincible.

0 for flowers0

If the original Dragon Wolf Realm Master had reached a hundred realms of extradimensional rules, Ye Tian would not be able to kill the other party at all.

At the beginning, the other party's extra-dimensional rule realm seemed to be the realm of forty or fifty realms, and it was estimated that it was also a fluke to break through to the fourth realm, and after breaking through to the fourth realm, the progress was also very slow.

Airplanes!!!!

The extradimensional rules diffused, forming a majestic realm, as if he could wipe out the most powerful third realm with a single thought, and he could wipe out a group of third realms with a single breath.

That's the terrible thing about the extradimensional rules realm!

This is still the first entry into the realm of extradimensional rules, if you comprehend a thousand extradimensional rules, the realm of extradimensional rules can reach the realm of Xiaocheng, and 10,000 extradimensional rules, the realm of extradimensional rules can reach the realm of Dacheng.

If you want to elevate the realm of extradimensional rules to the realm of perfection, you need to comprehend 100,000 extradimensional rules.

"I can impact the fourth realm, once I become the super dimensional rule of the fourth realm, my strength will inevitably skyrocket, and then it will be enough to match the top fourth realm super dimensional rule, on the side of the five thousand realm, even if it is not invincible, it will be about the same!"

......

Terran.

Ye Tian prepared a large amount of resources and began to attack the Fourth Realm.

The mystery of the third realm impacting the fourth realm, he naturally knew that it was to let the extra-dimensional realm in the body complete the ascension and become a higher dimension, and the super-dimensional realm in the body must be very perfect, otherwise the ascension would easily fail, which would lead to the collapse of the extra-dimensional realm in the body and even the fall of oneself.

"Let's go!"

One hundred extra-dimensional rule realms are transformed into extra-dimensional rule realms and integrated into the extra-dimensional realm in the body, assisting the extra-dimensional realm in the body to ascend and evolve.

Rumble!!!!

The extra-dimensional realm in the body began to ascend, and a large number of extra-dimensional resources poured into the extra-dimensional realm in the body to help it complete its transformation.

Thundered!!!!!

The transcendent realm in Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his physical body also began to transform, this is a successful breakthrough, and the process is very smooth, and there is no problem, this is the 100% breakthrough success rate of a hundred extradimensional rule realms.
